sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text) VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'ClickHouse is great!');
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'Fuzzy Testing' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitive(text, 'hello') AS is_subsequence FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitive(text, 'great') AS is_subsequence FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
